memberdef.definition: unsafe new ref float MR.Box_Vector4f.this[int e]
memberdef.name: this[int e]

briefdescription.para: Make a copy of a struct. (Even though we initially pass is_owning: false, we then use the copy constructor to produce an owning instance.)

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z, float w)
memberdef.name: Box_Vector4f

briefdescription.para: assuming this is a point represented in homogeneous 4D coordinates, returns the point as 3D-vector Generated from method MR.Vector4f.proj3d.
Convert from a struct by copying it. Note that only ConstBox_Vector4f has this conversion, Box_Vector4f intentionally doesn't.
four-dimensional vector Generated from class MR.Vector4f. This is the non-const reference to the struct.
